name: Project Zomboid
description: Project Zomboid dedicated server template using direct SteamCMD install/runtime. Stable installs omit beta flags; set SRCDS_BETAID only when a real Steam beta branch is required.

install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  apt-get update
  apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl lib32gcc-s1 lib32stdc++6 netcat-openbsd telnet
fi

if [[ "${STEAM_USER:-}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS:-}" == "" ]]; then
  echo "steam user is not set; using anonymous login"
  STEAM_USER=anonymous
  STEAM_PASS=""
  STEAM_AUTH=""
else
  echo "steam user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64 /mnt/server/logs
curl --fail --location --show-error --retry 5 --retry-delay 3 --connect-timeout 20 -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

steamcmd=(./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "${STEAM_USER}" )
if [[ -n "${STEAM_PASS:-}" ]]; then steamcmd+=("${STEAM_PASS}"); fi
if [[ -n "${STEAM_AUTH:-}" ]]; then steamcmd+=("${STEAM_AUTH}"); fi
if [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL:-0}" == "1" ]]; then steamcmd+=(+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows); fi
steamcmd+=(+app_update "${SRCDS_APPID:-380870}")
if [[ -n "${SRCDS_BETAID:-}" ]]; then steamcmd+=(-beta "${SRCDS_BETAID}"); fi
if [[ -n "${SRCDS_BETAPASS:-}" ]]; then steamcmd+=(-betapassword "${SRCDS_BETAPASS}"); fi
if [[ -n "${INSTALL_FLAGS:-}" ]]; then
  # shellcheck disable=SC2206
  extra_flags=(${INSTALL_FLAGS})
  steamcmd+=("${extra_flags[@]}")
fi
steamcmd+=(validate +quit)

"${steamcmd[@]}"

if [[ -f linux32/steamclient.so ]]; then cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so; fi
if [[ -f linux64/steamclient.so ]]; then cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so; fi
cd /mnt/server
rm -f /mnt/server/start-server.sh
chmod +x /mnt/server/ProjectZomboid64 2>/dev/null || true
chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/server 2>/dev/null || true
chmod -R u+rwX,go+rX /mnt/server

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed"
echo "-----------------------------------------"
